categories.name: Tarpaulins
categories.description: Leno/clear, extra strong, all-purpose and waterproof covers in multiple sizes and weights.

categories.name: Dust Sheets

categories.name: Sacks & Bags

sections.title: 🛡️ Featured Tarpaulins
sections.subtitle: Our most popular covers — waterproof, UV-stabilised, trade and retail

products.name: All-Purpose Tarpaulin
products.description: Waterproof PE tarp with aluminium grommets at 1m intervals. Heat sealed, PE rope through hem. Ideal for temporary cover work.

products.name: Extra Strong Tarpaulin
products.description: Heavy-duty reinforced PVC tarpaulin. Tear resistant, UV stabilised. Brass eyelets every 500mm. Long-lasting outdoor protection.

products.name: Leno / Clear Tarpaulin
products.description: Extra strong, waterproof and rot proof. Allows 70% light transmission. Ideal for work that needs to be carried out undercover.

products.name: Heavy Duty Scaffolding Sheet
products.description: Flame retardant option available. Reinforced edges and eyelets for scaffold wrapping, skip covers, and building enclosures.

sections.title: 🧹 Dust Sheets, Sacks & Brushes
sections.subtitle: Cotton dust sheets, heavy-duty sacks and professional painting accessories

products.name: Calico Cotton Dust Sheet 12×9ft
products.description: 100% Cotton Dust Sheet. Weight: 1.6kg. Size: 12ft × 9ft. 10 sheets per bale. Ideal while decorating to protect floors and furnishings.

products.name: Cotton Twill Dust Sheet 12×5ft
products.description: Pure cotton twill dust sheet. Weight: 1.0kg. Size: 12ft × 5ft. 20 sheets per bale. Sturdy cotton twill fabric, machine-washable.

products.name: Woven Rubble Sacks
products.description: Size: 36" × 24". Weight: 90g. Packed 100 bags per bale. Suitable for clearing rubble and general building waste.
features: Suitable for rubble and building waste

products.name: Block Brush & Contractor Paint Brush Set
products.description: Range includes: block brush, contractor paint brush, Acer brush, personal cage frame with wooden handle, and 4" acrylic tiger stripe roller set.

cards.title: Open a trade account — buy at wholesale prices
cards.body: Painters, decorators, builders, and site managers — register for a Tri Star trade account and unlock exclusive pricing, monthly invoicing, and bulk order discounts.

cards.title: Bespoke & bulk orders — we'll source it
cards.body: With direct sourcing relationships in Europe, India, and the Far East, we can fulfil custom specifications, unusual sizes, and large volume orders that aren't on the shelf.

sections.title: Need a bespoke tarpaulin or bulk order?
sections.subtitle: We source directly from Europe, India and the Far East — any spec, any quantity. Call us on 01438 880 178 or send an enquiry.

stats.label: Sourcing continents — Europe, India, Far East
Free UK delivery threshold ex VAT

steps.title: Browse & select
steps.description: Find your product by category or search. Filter by size, material, or type. Not sure? Download our full price list.

steps.title: Login or register
steps.description: Create a retail account to see prices, or apply for a trade account for wholesale pricing and terms.

steps.title: Checkout securely
steps.description: Pay by card, bank transfer, or on account (trade customers). Order confirmation sent instantly.

steps.title: Fast UK delivery
steps.description: Orders placed before 2pm despatched same day. Track your delivery online or call 01438 880 178.

rows.useCase: General outdoor cover, gardening, camping, temporary cover
Greenhouses, market stalls, undercover work needing light

summaryBar.bodyText: Tri Star UK Ltd is rated Excellent by our customers on Trustpilot.

reviews.quote: We've been ordering cotton dust sheets from Tri Star for 12 years. The calico quality has never dropped, the prices are better than any other supplier I've found, and they always get our bulk orders out fast.

The extra strong tarpaulins are brilliant — we use them on scaffolding every week. Heavy, well made, grommets hold up to the wind. The trade account means I don't have to pay every order, which is a big help for cash flow.

Good range of rubble sacks and tonne bags at sensible prices. Delivery was quick and well packed. Would like even more size options on the tonne bags — but have already ordered three times and will keep coming back.

sections.title: Stay ahead — trade offers & new stock
sections.subtitle: Join 1,800+ decorators, builders, and site managers who get early access to promotions, new product lines, and price list updates.
sections.note: No spam. Unsubscribe any time. We never share your details.

brand.description: Leading importer and distributor of cotton dust sheets, tarpaulins, sacks, bags, and painting accessories. Family-owned business serving the UK trade and retail for 30 years. All products directly sourced from Europe, India and the Far East.
